asset_name: Bremelanotide / PT-141 Pivotal Human Evidence Source Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_type: Primary human efficacy and translation evidence
evidence_grade: B1 — pivotal or major randomised human evidence
controlled_conclusion: The two RECONNECT phase 3 randomised double-blind placebo-controlled trials evaluated product-specific bremelanotide in premenopausal women with acquired generalised HSDD. The primary results were statistically significant on specified desire and distress endpoints, but the magnitude and endpoint interpretation must remain explicit and bounded.

sources.title: Bremelanotide for HSDD: two randomised phase 3 trials
Long-term safety and efficacy of bremelanotide for HSDD

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised finished product to catalogue supplier powder
Transfer from trial material to unverified supplier material
Creation of dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
next_review_trigger: Material label, indication, safety, regulatory, trial, manufacturer, quality or supplier-evidence change
